description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named UnitTests that runs on push to master and develop branches and on pull requests to these branches. The workflow should have four jobs: build_linux, build_linux_no_boost, build_windows, and build_windows_no_boost. Each job runs on a different environment (ubuntu-latest or windows-latest), checks out the code, configures the environment using custom actions, and then builds and tests the code using another custom action with different parameters.
